$comment: Publication artifact inventory for egohygiene/reflector v0.1.1. Generated 2026-06-02.

artifacts.name: reflector.pdf
artifacts.description: Main research paper PDF, compiled from paper/paper.tex via latexmk
artifacts.retention: duration of workflow run (docs/ staging); 30 days (GitHub Actions artifact)

artifacts.name: reflector-magazine.pdf
artifacts.description: Digital magazine PDF, compiled from magazine/tex/magazine.tex
artifacts.producer: pages.yml (deploy job) or publication.yml (build-magazine job) or build-magazine.yml

artifacts.name: reflector-magazine-print.pdf
artifacts.description: Print-ready magazine PDF, compiled from magazine/tex/magazine-print.tex
artifacts.producer: pages.yml (deploy job) or publication.yml (build-magazine job) or build-magazine.yml

artifacts.name: reflector-arxiv-v{VERSION}.zip
artifacts.description: arXiv submission bundle as ZIP archive (LaTeX source tree)

artifacts.name: reflector-arxiv-v{VERSION}.tar.gz
artifacts.description: arXiv submission bundle as tarball (LaTeX source tree)

artifacts.name: release-manifest.json
artifacts.description: Canonical release manifest with artifact inventory and checksums

artifacts.name: checksums.txt
artifacts.description: SHA256 checksums for all canonical release assets

artifacts.name: publication.json
artifacts.description: Publication metadata JSON generated from canonical metadata sources

artifacts.name: publication-inventory.json
artifacts.description: Full publication artifact inventory generated during package job

artifacts.name: release-notes.md
artifacts.description: Release notes extracted from CHANGELOG.md for the current version

artifacts.name: publication-readiness.md
artifacts.description: Publication readiness audit report from scripts/audit-publication-readiness.py

artifacts.name: hero.png
artifacts.description: Hero image for GitHub Pages landing page

artifacts.name: source.zip
artifacts.description: Full repository source archive attached to GitHub Release

ownership.paper_pdf: publication.yml is canonical owner for full releases; pages.yml is canonical owner for Pages deployment
ownership.magazine_pdfs: publication.yml (full release path); build-magazine.yml (artifact-only path); pages.yml (Pages deployment)
ownership.arxiv_bundles: publication.yml (package job) is the sole producer
ownership.release_manifest: scripts/stage-publication-release.py is canonical producer; committed to repository
ownership.checksums: publication.yml (package job) and release-paper.yml both produce; publication.yml is canonical for full releases
ownership.publication_json: scripts/validate-metadata.py is canonical producer; committed to repository
ownership.github_release: publication.yml (release job) is canonical owner; release-paper.yml is secondary (tag-triggered) with existence guard

lifecycle_notes: PDFs are never committed to the repository. They are transient build outputs staged in docs/ during pages.yml runs and in release/ during publication.yml runs.
When pages.yml runs with a skipped paper build and no docs/ PDF exists, Pages serves the last deployed version without error.
The release/ staging directory is ephemeral — created per run and cleaned up. Artifacts are uploaded to GitHub Releases for persistence.
publication.json and release-manifest.json are committed to the repository as the single source of truth for release metadata.
Zenodo receives source.zip automatically via the GitHub release webhook. PDF upload to Zenodo requires manual or scripted intervention (tracked as L3).
